query: Iran IAEA cooperation law suspension 2025 2026, current state of Iran nuclear inspections and diplomacy, US Iran nuclear deal negotiations status June July 2026
answer:
I've completed the research and provided the structured findings. Here is a summary of what I found on the current state of Iran-IAEA cooperation and US-Iran nuclear diplomacy as of July 2026:

**IAEA Cooperation Suspension Law:** Still in force. Iran's parliament voted to suspend cooperation June 25, 2025 (221-1); Pezeshkian signed it July 2, 2025. Iran briefly restored partial cooperation via the September 2025 Cairo Agreement but terminated it November 20, 2025. Verification collapsed further after the February 28, 2026 US-Israel strikes.

**Current Inspections:** Severely limited. As of early July 2026, IAEA inspectors access only Bushehr power plant and Tehran reactor — not the bombed enrichment sites. The June 4, 2026 IAEA report says the agency cannot verify the size or whereabouts of Iran's uranium; last verified figures (June 2025): **440.9 kg of 60% HEU** and ~9,040 kg total enriched UF6.

**US-Iran Diplomacy:** A fragile interim framework — the Islamabad Memorandum (signed remotely by Trump and Pezeshkian June 17, 2026) — ended the 2026 Iran War and opened a 60-day window for a final deal. First round in Switzerland (June 22–23) produced a roadmap and a 60-day US oil-sanctions waiver. July 1–2 Doha talks reported "positive progress" on implementation (including a $6bn frozen-asset purchasing mechanism) but no breakthrough. Talks paused for Khamenei's funeral processions.

**Core disputes:** timing/scope of inspections (interim vs. only after final deal), sanctions-relief sequencing (Iran demands full termination), and access to bombed sites/accounting for the 60% HEU. Grossi insists inspections "are going to happen"; Iran ties this to a final deal.

The full synthesis with all sources and data points has been delivered via the structured output.

data_points.metric: Iran parliament vote to suspend IAEA cooperation (votes in favor)
Iran total enriched uranium in UF6 form (last IAEA-verified)
Frozen Iranian assets subject to Doha talks purchasing mechanism
US oil sanctions waiver duration following first round of talks
Window for final-deal negotiations under the Islamabad MoU
Iranian declared sites IAEA has been denied access to
